allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Count:', p.length\); if\(p[0]\) console.log\('First keys:', Object.keys\(p[0]\).join\(', '\)\); if\(p[0]\) console.log\('Has slug:', !!p[0].slug, 'Has sun:', Array.isArray\(p[0].sun\)\);")
